interpretation.very-fragile: Very fragile fresh product. Refrigeration required, ~1–2 weeks shelf.
interpretation.fragile: Fragile. Refrigeration required, ~3–4 weeks. Standard fresh formulation.
interpretation.functionally-stable: Functionally shelf-stable. Indefinite at room temperature.

warnings.composition_incomplete: {{count}} ingredients are using category-default composition. Numbers below are approximate — fill in explicit composition for accurate predictions.
warnings.no_water: No water present. Water activity calculation does not apply.
warnings.extreme_saturation: Aqueous sugar saturation at {{aqueousSugarPct}}% is at the edge of the Norrish model's reliable range. Treat predicted Aw as a lower bound.
warnings.declared_diverges: Declared shelf life ({{declaredDays}} days) and predicted shelf life ({{predictedWeeks}} weeks) disagree by more than one band. Verify the declared value or refine the recipe.
warnings.missing_density: {{count}} volume-measured ingredient(s) ({{names}}) have no density set, so they're excluded from water-activity and shelf-life. Add a density to include them.

norrish.title: Norrish equation (Chirife et al. 1980)
norrish.footnoteLactose: Lactose K=10.2 is an upper-bound estimate; limited solubility data.
norrish.footnoteEthanol: Ethanol K=1.60 is estimated; {{lossPct}}% volatility loss applied to recipe mass.
norrish.constants: Norrish constants (natural log scale): sucrose 6.47, maltose 4.54, glucose & fructose 2.25, lactose 10.2, sorbitol 1.66, glycerol 1.15, ethanol 1.60. Source: Chirife et al. 1980 via Ergun, Lietha & Hartel, Critical Reviews in Food Science 50:162–192 (2010). Model accuracy ±1.5% within calibration range; underestimates depression at extreme saturation (>75% solute by mass in aqueous phase).

browning.title: Maillard browning
browning.explanation: Relative browning potential: reducing sugars + protein integrated over the bake time·temperature, modulated by water activity — not an absolute color.
browning.noReactants: Little browning expected: Maillard needs both reducing sugars and protein.

doneness.title: Thermal doneness
doneness.biotWarning: Likely too thick for a uniform-core estimate; the true core runs cooler than shown.
doneness.caveat: Estimated core temperature for a typical ~2 cm portion (Newtonian heating), treating step temperatures as the oven/medium, not the core. Add portion thickness for a recipe-specific result.

ph.title: pH equilibrium (charge-balance solver)
ph.explanation: Each component contributes acids and counterions weighted by its water mass in the aqueous phase. The solver finds the pH where total charge balance is zero across all polyprotic species. Mixed system equilibrium: pH {{pH}}.

interpretation.high: Above casein's isoelectric point (4.6) — no curdle risk from pH alone.
interpretation.moderate: Above casein's isoelectric point but in a sensitized range — standard technique works.
interpretation.low: Below casein's isoelectric point (4.6) — curdle risk requires careful temperature control during fold.
interpretation.veryLow: Well below casein's isoelectric point (4.6) — curdle is essentially guaranteed if cream contacts at high temperature.

ribbon.empty: Add ingredients to see live physics.

warnings.curdle_risk_medium: Cream may curdle from acidity (pH {{pH}}). Hold cream below {{foldTempCeiling}}°C during the fold.
warnings.curdle_risk_high: High curdle risk (pH {{pH}}). Cream must stay below {{foldTempCeiling}}°C during the fold; consider adding a buffering ingredient (honey, cocoa butter) before the acid.
warnings.fat_regime_inversion: Fat content {{fatPct}}% is approaching emulsion inversion. Mix gradually and watch for breaking.
warnings.fat_regime_oil_in_water: Fat content {{fatPct}}% will set fluid (oil-in-water). Will not cut clean.
warnings.no_chocolate_in_confectionery: Confectionery without chocolate detected — verify category tag is correct.
warnings.multiple_chocolate_classes: Multiple chocolate classes detected ({{classes}}). Temper to the dominant class's window.
warnings.ethanol_above_tolerance: Ethanol {{abv}}% post-retention exceeds operational tolerance. Reduce alcohol or accept reduced shelf prediction confidence.
warnings.ethanol_long_shelf_low: Ethanol {{abv}}% is below the 4–6% long-shelf band. Increase alcohol fraction for additional shelf bonus, or reduce it to zero.
warnings.sorbet_detected_in_confectionery: Sorbet-like composition (no fat, fruit puree dominant) inside confectionery — verify category tag.
warnings.inclusion_oversized_for_truffle: Inclusions detected — for truffles, target a 60-mesh particle size or smaller.

frozen.pac_tooltip: Sweetness/Anti-freezing Power. Controls serving temperature scoopability.
frozen.pod_tooltip: Relative sweetness power compared to sucrose.
frozen.msnf_tooltip: Milk Solids Non-Fat. Provides body but causes sandiness if too high.
frozen.ts_tooltip: Total Solids. Affects texture, warmth, and chew.
frozen.scoopability_desc: Modeled scoop firmness at standard service temp range.

warnings.pod_out_of_band: POD ({{pod}}%) is outside typical {{subtype}} range ({{min}}-{{max}}%). May taste too sweet or not sweet enough.
warnings.total_solids_high: Total Solids ({{ts}}%) exceeds {{subtype}} maximum ({{maxTs}}%). May yield a gummy, warm texture.
warnings.total_solids_low: Total Solids ({{ts}}%) is below {{subtype}} minimum ({{minTs}}%). May yield a weak, icy structure.
warnings.sorbet_dairy_present: Sorbet inferred but dairy ({{msnf}}% MSNF) detected. Consider Sherbet or Gelato classification.
warnings.gelato_no_milk_powder: Gelato composition generally requires 3-5% skim milk powder to absorb free water. None detected.
warnings.sandiness_risk: Lactose exceeds 11% of MSNF phase ({{pct}}%). Sandiness risk due to lactose crystallization.
warnings.scoopability_brick: PAC and structural factors indicate the mix will freeze solid (brick) at standard display cabinet temperatures.
warnings.scoopability_soup: PAC and structural factors indicate the mix will be too soft (soupy) at standard display cabinet temperatures.

warnings.no_flour: No flour detected. Baker's percentages cannot be calculated.
warnings.salt_low: Salt ({{pct}}%) is below the standard minimum (1.4%). Fermentation may be too rapid and flavor lacking.
warnings.salt_high: Salt ({{pct}}%) exceeds the standard maximum (2.4%). Yeast activity may be severely suppressed.
warnings.yeast_low: Instant yeast equivalent ({{pct}}%) is below the {{subtype}} minimum ({{min}}%).
warnings.yeast_high: Instant yeast equivalent ({{pct}}%) exceeds the {{subtype}} maximum ({{max}}%).
warnings.sourdough_has_instant: Sourdough formulation typically relies only on natural starter, but instant/fresh yeast was detected.
warnings.gluten_weak: Gluten matrix score ({{score}}) is too weak for structural bread. Increase protein or hydration.
warnings.gluten_over_developed: Gluten matrix score ({{score}}) is dangerously high. Dough may collapse or become rubbery.
warnings.water_temp_cold: Calculated water temperature ({{temp}}°C) is near freezing. Adjust room or flour temp.
warnings.water_temp_hot: Calculated water temperature ({{temp}}°C) will kill yeast. Adjust room or flour temp.
warnings.fat_in_lean_dough: Added fat detected in a lean dough subtype ({{subtype}}). Recheck categorization.
warnings.missing_whole_wheat: Whole wheat bread specified but whole grain fraction is only {{pct}}%. Target is >50%.

optimizer.noBaseRecipeHelp: Open a confectionery recipe and click Optimize to begin.

searchSpace.title: Search Space
searchSpace.empty: No adjustable dimensions for this recipe.
